# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the scoped change.

## Validation

List commands run, including tests and dry runs.

## Provenance And Safety

- [ ] No raw data files are committed.
- [ ] No generated JSONL/SQLite/CSV/parquet outputs are committed.
- [ ] No solve claim is introduced.
- [ ] Documentation and developer logs are updated when relevant.
- [ ] GitHub/wiki changes are idempotent when relevant.

## Related Issues

Link issues or state `None`.
